findings.summary: In apps/api/src/worker-drain-loop.ts, onWaitingReactivation attempts to update a Run's status by incorrectly mutating a Repository record. It calls update() on deps.repos (a RepositoryPort) using repoId, rather than updating the Run record via a run repository port.
findings.suggested_fix: Add an `updateRun: (runId: RunId, patch: Partial<Run>) => void` port to WorkerLoopDeps, wire it to `runRepository.update` in apps/api/src/compose.ts, and call `deps.updateRun(runId, { status: next.status })` instead of casting and calling `deps.repos.update`.
